'''Yin Metal Rabbit''' is the 28th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 辛 Kanoto (yin metal, the luna-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 卯 U, the [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's metal overcomes the branch's wood, a relationship of restraint.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Metal Tiger]] (node 27) and [[Yang Water Dragon]] (node 29).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoto (辛)]] — yin metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] — yin wood
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Metal Tiger]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Water Dragon]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062275}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
